children.label: A
children.text: a foreign corporation in an exchange described in section 332, 351, 354, 355, 356, or 361, or

children.label: B
children.text: a foreign partnership in a contribution described in section 721 or in any other contribution described in regulations prescribed by the Secretary, or
makes a distribution described in section 336 to a person who is not a United States person,

children.heading: Exceptions for certain transfers to foreign partnerships; special rule
children.label: b Exceptions for certain transfers to foreign partnerships; special rule
A
children.text: the United States person holds (immediately after the transfer) directly or indirectly at least a 10-percent interest (as defined in section 6046A(d)) in the partnership, or

children.label: B
children.text: the value of the property transferred (when added to the value of the property transferred by such person or any related person to such partnership or a related partnership during the 12-month period ending on the date of the transfer) exceeds $100,000.

children.heading: Special rule
children.label: 2 Special rule
children.text: If by reason of an adjustment under section 482 or otherwise, a contribution described in subsection (a)(1) is deemed to have been made, such contribution shall be treated for purposes of this section as having been made not earlier than the date specified by the Secretary.

children.heading: Penalty for failure to furnish information
children.label: c Penalty for failure to furnish information

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: If any United States person fails to furnish the information described in subsection (a) at the time and in the manner required by regulations, such person shall pay a penalty equal to 10 percent of the fair market value of the property at the time of the exchange (and, in the case of a contribution described in subsection (a)(1)(B), such person shall recognize gain as if the contributed property had been sold for such value at the time of such contribution).

children.heading: Reasonable cause exception
children.label: 2 Reasonable cause exception
children.text: Paragraph (1) shall not apply to any failure if the United States person shows such failure is due to reasonable cause and not to willful neglect.

children.heading: Limit on penalty
children.label: 3 Limit on penalty
children.text: The penalty under paragraph (1) with respect to any exchange shall not exceed $100,000 unless the failure with respect to such exchange was due to intentional disregard.
